name: Structured data — schema.org and GPS extraction
prompt: Fetch one place page (fiche) from https://loisirs74.fr and report what schema.org structured data it exposes, then extract the GPS coordinates from it. Read-only task: never submit forms or make bookings.

judge.check: Identified the JSON-LD @type(s) present on the fiche
Extracted GPS coordinates that match the page's JSON-LD geo data
